purpose: Gate tier for maṣdar / ism fāʿil / ism mafʿūl decisions. The gloss SHAPE must be nominal; a finite-verb gloss on these is a POS-mismatch blocker.

rules.when: surface is a maṣdar (ذِكْر, إِنفَاق, اِسْتِغْفَار)
rules.require: nominal gloss ('the act of …'); never a finite verb

rules.when: the maṣdar collides with a noun/verb of the root under norm() (ذِكْر / ذَكَر / ذَكَرَ)
ism fāʿil / ism mafʿūl (كَافِر, مُؤْمِن, مَخْلُوق)
rules.require: agent/patient noun gloss; never a finite verb

rules.when: مُـ participle split by the penult vowel (مُعَلِّم vs مُعَلَّم) and the vowel is absent/ambiguous
a 'to …' verb gloss is proposed on a maṣdar/participle/noun
